TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Hans-Adam_II, title = Hans-Adam_II, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Hans-Adam_II} }

S.FORM: == Hans-Adam II == ryax sa tay 14 nqu tay 2, Hans-Adam II, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1945) mrhuw Liechtenstein ta' misuw hya' ga Hans-Adam II, aring ryax tay 13 squ byacing tay 11 sa kawas 1989 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qnxan nya Hans-Adam II maki tay kawas 1967 msqun ki Marie, Princess of Liechtenstein, tehuk misuw qani. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

== Hans-Adam II == ryax sa tay 14 nqu tay 2, Hans-Adam II, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1945) mrhuw Liechtenstein ta' misuw hya' ga Hans-Adam II, aring ryax tay 13 squ byacing tay 11 sa kawas 1989 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qnxan nya Hans-Adam II maki tay kawas 1967 msqun ki Marie, Princess of Liechtenstein, tehuk misuw qani. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: == ħans~ɕ-a*am ii == rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, ħans~ɕ-a*am ii, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw lieʦ~ʨħtens~ɕtein taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa ħans~ɕ-a*am ii, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj ** s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. qnxan nja ħans~ɕ-a*am ii maki taj kawas~ɕ **** ms~ɕqun ki marie, prinʦ~ʨes~ɕs~ɕ o* lieʦ~ʨħtens~ɕtein, teħuk mis~ɕuw qani. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
